title: Fukuro TelemetryEventV1
description: One NDJSON line of telemetry produced by an external system for `fukuro import`. Fukuro owns this contract; producers vendor snapshots of it.

source.description: Producing system id (e.g. ouro). Combined with sourceEventId for idempotency.

occurredAt.description: Source-stamped instant; becomes the event's ts. Must not be in the future.

kind.description: Canonical fukuro kinds pair into ledgers/KPIs; namespaced producer kinds are accepted as-is.

subject.description: The unit this event is about; import derives loop_id as `<source>:<subject.id>`.

refs.description: Related resources. GitHub issue/pull refs with numeric tails fill the issue/pr columns; the rest stay with the producer.
